entry.title: SAP Datasphere News in August
entry.content:
Vacation period ⛱️ comes to an end, and we delivered a strong release in August. There are also lots of excellent new blogs in the community and top features on YouTube for below.

 

My top features in August

 

Compatibility Contracts

To encourage confidence in the stability of your views and to guarantee backward compatibility when they are updated, you can now set their Release State to Released. Once a view is released, it must continue to provide the same output columns until it is replaced by a successor, at which point it can be deprecated and, eventually, decommissioned.
The release states are an optional feature. By default, all views are set to Not Released and there is no obligation to release any view.
More information.

 

Workload Management

You can now set space priorities and statement limits for all the spaces in the new Workload Management page under System and Configuration. In the space details pages, you can view the values set for the space priority and statement limits, but you can no longer edit them there. 
Similarly, on the CLI we have deprecated some parameters for the space definition, and they will be removed in future releases. At the same time new ones are introduced and recommended to be used going forward. 
More information.

 

Change Space Upon Import

When working with content packages previously, you were restricted to import them into spaces with the same technical name as the spaces listed in the package. Now you can choose which spaces to import into by selecting a Space Mapping for each space listed in your package, as long as any shared objects can be resolved in the same package.

This helps you to

  • import content on the same tenant into different spaces
  • import a package more than once in the same tenant thus creating copies in different spaces
  • support for intra-tenant transport i.e., space to space transport using the Content Network

More information.

 

 

Support Content on SAP Help

@Ali_Chalhoub already started a few blogs highlighting the new Support Content pages on SAP help for SAP Datasphere. These pages cover troubleshooting and analysis guides, how-to guides, technical details, and more. This is just the beginning, and they will be extended over time.

These blog highlight some topics covered on the pages, and there is already much more:

  • Troubleshooting of Performance Issues Between SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) and Datasphere
  • Using SAP Cloud Integration to Consume/Connect to Datasphere OData API with OAuth 2.0
  • Understanding and Documenting the Communication Flow in Remote table, Replication and Dataflow

 

My top blogs in August

@GaetanSaulnier announces the general availability of the technical integration between SAP Datasphere and the Collibra Data Intelligence Platform in his blog and shares a lot of details
➡️ SAP Datasphere and Collibra: End-to-End Data Catalog Integration

@FlorianN and @GregoryRohloff added another blog and video each to the already existing series about the data marketplace:
➡️ SAP Datasphere data marketplace - behind the scenes - new video for marketplace video series
➡️ E2E Use Case: Realizing a Data Product Architecture with SAP IT

@SandyTran started a great blog and video series covering native features in SAP Datasphere which people with strong SAP BW skills will certainly love in her blog
➡️ SAP Datasphere: BW Series – Getting Started.

 

Blogs for our Japanese Community

  • SAP Datasphereの翻訳機能による多言語設定の方法
  • SAP Datasphere ビジネスコンテンツ概要とインストール手順
  • ビジネスコンテンツ「 Finance Foundation for SAP S/4HANA and S/4HANA Cloud」を実装してみよう！
  • SAP Datasphere ビジネスコンテンツ概要とインストール手順
  • SAP Integration Suiteを使ってSAP Datasphereからデータを抽出する方法 OData編

 

More blogs to check out 👇

  • Exploring Data Access Control: Ensuring Consistency from SAC to Datasphere and Back - Blog 2
  • E2E Use Case: Realizing a Data Product Architecture with SAP IT
  • SAP Datasphere Security & Data Access Controls Overview
  • Data Templates for Concur Data Delivery Service (DDS) : POLICY COMPLIANCE SAC Story 
  • Datasphere to Power BI via an ODBC Connection
  • SAP Datasphere and Collibra: End-to-End Data Catalog Integration
  • SAC Report Broadcasting - Blog 1 - Imported Data
  • Data Templates for Concur Data Delivery Service (DDS) : CREDIT CARD PROGRAM MANAGEMENT SAC Story
  • Data Templates for DDS: Expense Administration SAC Story
  • SAP Datasphere data marketplace - behind the scenes - new video for marketplace video series
  • Using SAP Cloud Integration to Consume/Connect to Datasphere OData API with OAuth 2.0
  • Troubleshooting of Performance Issues Between SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) and Datasphere
  • Understanding and Documenting the Communication Flow in Remote table, Replication and Dataflow
  • Data Templates for Concur Data Delivery Expense
  • Importing Entities with Semantic of CDS views from S/4HANA On-Premise in SAP Datasphere
  • An Introduction in Automated Machine Learning with FLAML
  • Modernize your BW Landscape: SAP BW/4HANA and SAP Datasphere with SAP BW Bridge
  • SAP Datasphere: BW Series – Getting Started
  • Geo modeling in Datasphere with SAC Geo map
  • Data is the fuel for AI - Modernizing your BW landscape is preparing a data ready enterprise
  • Connect SAP Sales Cloud V2 to SAP Datasphere
  • New Feature - Ability to Disable Welcome Emails
  • E-Learning: SAP Datasphere Lifecycle Management

 

Find more information and related blog posts on the topic page for SAP Datasphere. You will find further product information on our Community with various subpages about Business Content, the SAP BW Bridge as well as content for Best Practices & Troubleshooting and the FAQ for SAP Datasphere.

Find out how to unleash the power of your business data with SAP’s free learning content on SAP Datasphere. It’s designed to help you enrich your data projects, simplify the data landscape, and make the most out of your investment. Check out even more role-based learning resources and opportunities to get certified in one place on  SAP Learning site.

entry.title: Issue Associating Supplier View in CBO for BP in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Hello,

I am currently facing an issue in the S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition while creating a Custom Business Object (CBO) for a Business Partner (BP). The problem arises when I attempt to associate the Business Object Supplier; it appears that the view does not exist.

I have also tried creating a CDS view to resolve this issue, but unfortunately, it did not work. How can I associtate a value help for my Business Partner field in my CBO please?

Thank you in advance for your assistance.

Best regards,

Flávio Fujita

entry.title: S4CLOUD Public version - how to create a previous period or previous year measure?
entry.content: With Public cloud scripting is not available, so trying to find a way to created previous period measures for comparison reasons. This is for Embedded reporting. Either in CDS view or Analytical Queries.  Anyone that can help and provide some guidance?

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP MTA for an Angular App
entry.content: You can use BAS to generate mta.yaml for react (and vue.js)  as described in React Development with SAP Business Application St... - SAP Community. The generated mta.yaml can be used for any html5 framework. The only difference is the build script in the module.

entry.title: Re: SAP MaxAttention - Expert Forum MEE/EMEA
entry.content:
Dear colleagues, 

I would like to share the event details with my customer, and I believe that there should be a beautifully formatted email template to do that. Can you send it to me or guide me where to find one?

entry.title: Re: Step by step guide for accessing SAP Fiori Launchpad on Portal
entry.content: For me, by checking the checkbox "default app on home page" on iview properties worked. Thank you very much for the help

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA CDS Views - MTD/YTD Using DateFunction
entry.content: Have you found a solution for this? Have the same requirement. Thanks

entry.title: Interact programmatically with SAP CAP framework's Node.js APIs without starting a server
entry.content:
Dear experts,

is this the correct approach to interact programmatically with the SAP CAP framework without starting a server?

I am working on a script to interact with the SAP Cloud Application Programming (CAP) framework programmatically without starting a server. Below is the code snippet I am using. Please note that the script is in a subfolder of my CAP project.

 

const path = require('path')

// 1. Use the node process environment to specify the CDS profile to be used
//    or default to 'hybrid-dev'
process.env.CDS_ENV = process.env.CDS_ENV || 'hybrid-dev'
// 2. Require the CDS module which also initializes the whole CDS environment
const cds = require('@sap/cds')
// 3. Safely change `cds.root`, that is used by all CAP runtime file access as the root directory
//    see https://cap.cloud.sap/docs/node.js/cds-test#test-in-folder
cds.test.in(path.resolve(__dirname, '..'))

// 4. Verify the CDS environment
console.log(cds.root)
console.log(cds.env.profiles)
console.log(cds.env.requires.db)

 

My goal is to interact with the CAP framework for tasks such as database operations and service interactions without the need to start an HTTP server. Is this the recommended way to achieve this? Are there any best practices or potential pitfalls I should be aware of when using this approach?

Unfortunately I couldn't find anything related to my requirement in the documentation.

Thank you for your insights!

Cheers,
Michael

entry.title: Re: I have a business Requirement to extend FIORI app - P...
entry.content: Thanks junwu, selecting from CDS helps. BADI MMIM_GR4XY_PROVIDE_DATA has changing parameters as CHANGE_ITEM which has only 5 fields to change and an include structure for extension. in my case, my requirement is to DELETE a particular row from Item table based on UEPOS.. I have fetched item whose UEPOS is blank, that needs to be now deleted.. How can I pass it to CHANGE_ITEM, since it has only 5 fields and no field to indicate deletion

entry.title: Re: Edge integration cell
entry.content:
@Rishi_and_SAP migration tool supports PO 7.4 from SP23 on, see https://help.sap.com/docs/integration-suite/sap-integration-suite/what-is-migration-tooling

Edge Integration Cell can be tried out if you go for free tier service plan, see https://me.sap.com/notes/2903776

Alex

entry.title: Cloud Integration - Advanced Event Mesh Adapter Issue
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm trying to use the "Advanced Event Mesh" Adapter from Cloud Integration. However, when I publish a message to a topic, I encounter the following error:

  • org.apache.camel.RuntimeCamelException: A reply was not received within the allotted time [1000 ms]


The message is correctly published in the AEM, I can see it in the subscribed queue, but the adapter still throws the error, even when publication went fine.

This is my configuration:

Could you please assist with this issue? I'd like to use this adapter, but the iFlow encounters an error even when the publishing seems to work fine.

P.S.: This very same iFlow works completely fine with the "AMQP" Receiver adapter, but I'd like to take advantage of the dedicated adapter's enhanced functionality.

Thank you!

Is it possible to connect one EC instance to more ECP systems? 

We have client who has more SAP HR mandants now and would like to migrate to ECP but I think it is not possible to connect one EC instance to more ECP systems.

What do you think? Do you have any real exeperiance with this topic?

Thanks a lot

Jan

entry.title: Re: How to transport migration cockpit project and objects from Dev to Qas in S4 Hana public cloud.
entry.content: Please don't post to Questions about SAP Websites (issue with community Website, etc.) if it's a question about SAP software. Instead, ask in Technology Q&A: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/qa-p/technology-questions. Hopefully someone will fix it for you.

entry.title: Re: Custom domain for multiple subaccounts
entry.content:
Hi everyone, i would like to know if it's possible to map multiple custom domain to a single Integration Suite tenant.

Thank you all

entry.title: Re: Suppress or filter the Not Assigned(REST_H) nodes in standard CDS Views?
entry.content:
It's not a tag, it looks like you have clicked on "Start a discussion" here: Reporting, Analytics and Planning | SAP Community.

You'd better go in Technology Q&A: (https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/qa-p/technology-questions), type your question in "Ask a Question" and click on Continue.

I'm asking the administrator to (Report...) to move your question.

entry.title: Re: Smart table Header count showing wrong .
entry.content: i don't think that is the reason.

entry.title: Re: How to create a test double for method of another class?
entry.content:
It's crazy to think that one can add unit tests without refactoring. Of course, refactoring only a minimum has still a tiny risk. If you don't want to take the risk, don't do unit test then (or you need to adopt a complex strategy).

Or use Test Seams, but many people and I think that it's a completely dumb strategy.

entry.title: Re: Launchpad configuration for SAPUI5 Adaptation project...
entry.content:
In general we no longer recommend creating an additional parameter for the tile/target mapping, like sap-appvar-id or save-appvar-id. If customers created such a parameter in a previous support package, they can continue using it.
Instead we recommend to use unique combination of semantic object/action, see chapter "Settings for SAPUI5 App Variants (created via key user adaptation or an adaptation project)": https://help.sap.com/docs/ABAP_PLATFORM_NEW/a7b390faab1140c087b8926571e942b7/33daedef95454af68903ef1238aa0373.html?version=latest#loio33daedef95454af68903ef1238aa0373__appvariants

However for your use case of replacing the standard app, please

  • create exactly the same target mapping (same semantic object/action/parameters ...) as for the standard app
  • assign your app variant/adaptation project to the same catalog as original app
  • remove the standard app from the catalog

Best regards, Silke

entry.title: Multi-picking in SAP WM
entry.content: Does standard SAP allow Multiple orders to be pick simultaneously?

entry.title: Re: Send emails Office 365 on outlook
entry.content: in my experience you can use SMTP, but in the AZURE you have to configure to use inherited security. this allows to send mail from smtp.

entry.title: Can someone tell me the logic behind the order in which the groups of tiles appear to users?
entry.content:
I need to change the order in which the created tile groups appear, or understand the logic that follows their standard ordering by the system

Thanks!

entry.title: Re: Absence Counting Rules 2.0 in Time Management - 2H 2023
entry.content:
Hi @TRAJA ,

You can configure "Holiday Work Pattern" in the job information as "Work on holidays" if the employee must work on a public holiday. Then, no matter if there is a temporary work schedule on that day, the hours as per the planned hours are deducted.

Moreover, the actual planned hours are available in the number of hours field as if the employee would have worked on a holiday. So, there is no need to create a custom field in the job info.

Hope this helps.

Kind Regards,

Priyanka

entry.title: Re: I have a business Requirement to extend FIORI app - P...
entry.content: I am selecting from CDS view and that helped to fetch data. now the question is BADI MMIM_GR4XY_PROVIDE_DATA has changing parameters as CHANGE_ITEM which has only 5 fields to change and an include structure for extension. in my case, my requirement is to DELETE a particular row from Item table based on UEPOS.. I have fetched item whose UEPOS is blank, that needs to be now deleted.. How can I pass it to CHANGE_ITEM, since it has only 5 fields and no field to indicate deletion

entry.title: Re: Process of ByProduct product use into Production Modu...
entry.content:
Hi nikunjmehta2290,

Sometimes, during the production process, by-products are created. By-products can be added in the production order as negative quantity components. When the production process is completed, by-products will enter the stock.

The Manual issue method for by-products is enabled in addition to the Backflush issue method, and by-products are then displayed in receipts from production. The ability to receive by-products with the Manual issue method enables you to manage them using the Serials/Batch valuation method.

Refer to this link: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_BUSINESS_ONE/f19b844f41b74a8c8ca26f4d501e032b/083d9e6f8cf64f8a9311fc8d43a7180e.html 

Kind regards,

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Re: SAP BOBJ 4.3 Service account in local administrator g...
entry.content: Hey, I finally got an answer from SAP Support that says differently. "As you questioned , " Does the service account need to stay as a local administrator after installation? " Ans. Yes , its need to be stay as local administrator , else SIA wont start or multiple services can have error. You can also refer the below article : 2339730 - Prerequisites for running the Server Intelligence Agent under the service account. - SAP for Me"

entry.title: PO Output Control Public Cloud compare to S/4HANA
entry.content:
Hi,

I hope you all doing well.

I have a question, how do you deal with message control in purchase orders in Public Cloud compare to S/4Hana?

In Public Cloud purchase order edit view - you do not have icons to edit/copy... output message positions in print preview anymore.

In S/4Hana ME22N messages, you have these to edit manually

A key user demands to act like in previous GUI and wish to edit a purchase order afterwards and delete the message position manually to not inform the supplier of changes. I know that in the Configuration there is the setting " Fields Relevant to Printouts of Changes", but he wants to do so in the app as well. How is the explaination not to have the flexibility anymore?

entry.title: Re: Limit the number of goals from populating in the perf...
entry.content: You have to set the min and max goals as well at Goal template level in XML

in S/4Hana Public Cloud 202408 I set the flag 'Unstaffed Projects' in customizing in the data entry profile
When I try to create a new task in Manage My Timesheet I can only enter work packages for Professional Services projects, it seems I cannot indicate EPPM projects for unstaffed WBS.

Thanks for your help

entry.title: Re: How to change more than one glossar entry?
entry.content: Hello Merle, moving several dictionary entries from one category to another category through one action is not a standard functionality in our system.

entry.title: Re: SAP BOBJ 4.3 Service account in local administrator g...

entry.title: Re: I have a business Requirement to extend FIORI app - P...
entry.content:
Hi Ryan,

I can find the entry based on posnr but how do i pass the deleted entry to CHANGE_ITEM which is a changing parameter... This parameter has 5 fields to only update the fields.. Please suggest

entry.title: SACF scenarios were automatically set to productive with Active check after using SWPM
entry.content:
The SAP S/4HANA Production application servers were migrated (Hardware migration). The SAP standard Software provisioning tool (SWPM) was used to perform this migration using the System copy option. There was no change at the Database side.

After this migration, we found that SWPM has by default set the SACF scenarios to Productive and Active. SWPM logs confirm that the Functional module SACF_SET_SBD was run due to which the scenarios were activated.

Before migration, these scenarios were not active at all. But post migration, with the scenarios active, users are facing issues while accessing various apps.

For some reason, we didn't have this issue in our lower environments, but are facing this in Production.

What would be the best approach to fix these issues in production, since we don't have the SACF productive scenarios active in lower environments? 

Would disabling the SACF productive scenarios help to get the Production back to normal?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: SACF scenarios were automatically set to productive w...
entry.content:
After a system copy, SACF will have all the scenarios that do not have a previous configuration set to it's productive default.

If you do not wish to use this scenario you can simply follow the second solution available in the attachment of SAP Note 0002926224 - Collection Note: New security settings for SAP S/4HANA and SAP BW/4HANA using SL Toolset and SUM.

  1. Use transaction SACF_COMPARE
  2. Mass update for production header data
  3. Select SACF entries to be disabled
  4. Select Status and/or SAL Mode to change settings for selected SACF entries (SAP Note 0001922808)

You could also turn the scenario to productive in the lower environments and simply add the required objects to the roles for the new checks.

entry.title: SAP metadata export
entry.content:
Hi,

I have to export the metadata of BO into an excel file. I read that we can use SAP BO SDK to export the metadata using java or VBA (BusinessObjects SDK for Microsoft Office). 

I need details of how to do this. What are the prerequisites and other things to do this. I am unable to find much details regarding this.

I am more interested in doing this using VBA and exporting the metadata directly into excel file. Any code example would also be helpful.

entry.title: Re: Select Hierarchy - Account type dimension - Sap analy...
entry.content: Also looking solution for this problem. In edit mode you can change the hierarchy, but in view mode it is grayed out.

entry.title: Learn how to leverage SAP Signavio Value Accelerators with the Value Accelerator Library
entry.content:
Dear Community,

Do you want to learn the recent news about SAP Signavio Value Accelerators and Value Accelerator Library?

Are you interested in leveraging them in your transformation projects?

If the answer is yes to any of the above, then please make sure to register for:

  • The upcoming empowerment webcasts called Meet-the-Expert sessions (registration links follow in the table below)

 

  • The SAP Signavio | business process transformation value map and the SAP S/4HANA Cloud, private edition value map  or the SAP S/4HANA value map (see video how to log in Value Maps)


Before you can access the links below, a one-time registration in the SAP Learning Hub, edition for SAP Enterprise Support, is required. A detailed step-by-step guide to registration can be found here.

 

Session Title:Dates:Target Audience:Time:Registration:

How to leverage SAP Signavio Value Accelerators with the Value Accelerator Library

September 24th, 2024APJ/EMEA9:00pm  – 10:30pm UTC +2 (CEST)Register

How to leverage SAP Signavio Value Accelerators with the Value Accelerator Library

September 24th, 2024NA/LA/EMEA10:00pm  – 11:30pm UTC -4 (EDT)Register

Do you want to stay up to date on further training and enablement offerings? -> Remember to subscribe to our monthly SAP Enterprise Support Academy newsletter: Subscribe here

To learn further details about the SAP Signavio solutions and about the upcoming Meet-the-Expert sessions – continue reading:

SAP Signavio solutions is a cloud-based business process management platform which can help you improve and transform business processes fast and at scale. With SAP Signavio solutions for business process transformation, you can understand and transform existing business processes while you optimize operational excellence and customer experience to build a more resilient and sustainable business. SAP Signavio solutions support the following areas:

  • Business process management
  • Process mining and recommendations
  • Process best practices and journey modeling
  • Process execution and automation


SAP Signavio Value Accelerators are sets of content that are specific to a theme – such as a business challenge, process, product, industry – and help you accelerate the time to value of your transformation projects. All content can be browsed and installed into your workspace via the value accelerator library.

The Meet-The-Expert session goals:

  • Accelerate time to value of your transformation projects
  • Provide a clear framework to start
  • Mitigate project risks, avoid errors and reworking
  • Draw on the experience of SAP and partners

entry.title: Re: I have a business Requirement to extend FIORI app - P...
entry.content: You don't have a parameter to pass, you would remove the entry from the table to see if the UI is updated according to your needs.

entry.title: Re: I have a business Requirement to extend FIORI app - P...
entry.content: can you specify which table? BADI has import and changing parameters.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)

I have been into SAP Basis domain from last 16 years and been following SAP twitter account to keep myself updated with company trends. I have learning a lot from SAP learning portal. Have SAP Certifications . This opportunity will definitely aid me in up skilling myself and make me very much productive for the company.

entry.title: Re: Users active in BizX but to be made inactive in LMS -...
entry.content: Hi @nathanharding thank you for your reply! Unfortunately we are not yet using integration center for that, we are not able to capture the non-EC users as well. I should also add that as of now we are still using the export job from Provisioning. Is is quite a tricky scenario but I am sure we can find a workaround 🙂

entry.title: Re: SAP Inside Track Munich 2024 (#sitMUC) - Secure Your Spot Now!
entry.content: Thank you for checking. I'm able to reproduce the issue. Seems that no new users get created.

entry.title: SAP CodeJam: Getting Started with Machine Learning using SAP HANA
entry.content:
On September 11, 2024, Vitaliy Rudnytskiy from SAP will be the guest speaker at a SAP CodeJam event in Isernhagen, near Hannover. The session will focus on "Getting Started with Machine Learning using SAP HANA." During this CodeJam, you'll learn how to leverage machine learning within SAP HANA to build ML models. By the end of the event, you'll be familiar with how SAP Business Application Studio integrates with Jupyter Notebooks. No prior experience in this area is required, but some initial setup on your computer is necessary: Prerequisites.

About SAP CodeJam

SAP CodeJams are interactive, hands-on events where SAP experts share their knowledge with participants. Developers have the opportunity to explore and experiment with the latest technologies through practical exercises. All you need to bring is your own laptop with the necessary setup. More details can be found on the SAP Community Forum: SAP CodeJam Forum.

The event is free to attend, but with only 35 spots available, early registration is essential. Catering will be provided on the day of the event. Please note that the session will be conducted entirely in English.

 

Please Register here: SAP CodeJam: Getting Started with Machine Learning using SAP HANA – Inwerken

entry.title: Re: SAP metadata export
entry.content:
Use BI RESTful API to retrieve the metadata.
You can call RESTful from your VBA or Java code.

entry.title: Communication Scenario for custom RFC list
entry.content:
Hi all, 

we need to call the standard RFM SADT_REST_RFC_ENDPOINT which is exposed in a BTP ABAP Environment from an onpremise S/4 system.

The technical setup is completed and we are able to call other RFMs, but this one is not contained in any standard Communication Scenario available, which leads to abap dump CALL_FUNCTION_REMOTE_ERROR UCON RFC Rejected. 

If we try to create a custom scenario, there is no option to manually add this RFM. 

Does anyone know if it is possible to do this and how? 

Thank you 
Regards

entry.title: Electronic Smart Invoicing in Zambia
entry.content:
Good day

The Zambia government introduced a smart invoice system from 1 July 2024. Our customer has to implement the electronic invoices which is a integration achieved through an interface with the Virtual Sales Data Controller (VSDC) which is a bridge between the Certified Invoicing System (CIS) and the ZRA Smart Invoice System. 

Since Zambia is not a localized supported country by SAP, we have difficulties to find a solution for these invoices to be send to the local government.  

Did anyone in the SAP environment faced the same challenge and how was it resolved, please? 

Many thanks

entry.title: Which report consider for Inventory valuation SAP Business One
entry.content:
Dear all,

Which report exactly consider OR give a final outcome to total stock quantity and total stock valuation into SAP Business One. 

Here,  Inventory Audit Report and Inventory in Warehouse Report (Detailed) gives two values. 

Also need to understanding on Inventory Audit Report V/S Inventory in Warehouse Report (Detailed) V/S Inventory Aging Report.

Regards,

Nikunj

entry.content: You would remove the row directly from CHANGE_ITEM for the POSNR in question.

entry.title: Re: Use of Sequence into SAP B1 / SAP Business One

Regards,

Nikunj

entry.title: Re: SAP metadata export
entry.content:
Read the help guide for using the BI RESTful SDK
https://help.sap.com/doc/2534ba1cbc6f433595e8582045503bcb/4.3.4/en-US/sbo43sp2_webi_restful_web_service_sdk_en.pdf

to call RESTfull from VBA. If you search the internet you will find many examples
here is one of them

Option Explicit

Sub Test_LateBinding()

    Dim objRequest As Object
    Dim strUrl As String
    Dim blnAsync As Boolean
    Dim strResponse As String

    Set objRequest = CreateObject("MSXML2.XMLHTTP")
    strUrl = "https://<server>:<port>/<1>"
    blnAsync = True

    With objRequest
        .Open "GET", strUrl, blnAsync
        .SetRequestHeader "Content-Type", "application/json"
        .Send
        'spin wheels whilst waiting for response
        While objRequest.readyState <> 4
            DoEvents
        Wend
        strResponse = .ResponseText
    End With

    Debug.Print strResponse

End Sub

entry.title: Re: Quick start guides to get oriented with
entry.content:
Any response to my comment from 8.10.2023? Thanks in advance! 😍

Thanks for fast response @David_Chaviano , I am thinking about how to use these materials in Czech Republic.
Do you do some courses to teach teachers or SAP Next-Gen 4 ALL community members how to use them in lectures? 
For me it looks like without prior knowledge of chosen technology it is hardly to be used in teaching.

entry.title: Re: How can I use Launchpad Notifications with a RAP App?
entry.content: Thanks for the input. So far I'm finding that notifications in Launchpad are more complicated to develop than entire transactional RAP apps. I would have expected to be able to easily build notifications with CDS views or something like that.

entry.title: Re: Migrating Workflows to Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Hello Gabriel,

Thank you for reaching out to us. I recommend you follow the step-by-step guide below to migrate from Workflow Management to SAP Build Process Automation.https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/transition-your-sap-workflow-management-solutio...

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/migrate-your-sap-btp-neo-workflow-applications-...In case you encounter any issues, please don't hesitate to let us know.

entry.title: Re: Deserialize JSON in SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Hello,

Thank you for reaching out to us. Are you still experiencing any issues? If so, have you tried creating a new data type and mapping it with a new variable to extract the data?

Please let us know if the issue persists.

entry.title: Re: BAdI: how to know what they are for without dev knowl...
entry.content:
Hi Luis,

This answer is for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition as you can't use transaction SE38 in public cloud.

If you use the Fiori app "Custom Logic" the system will show you all available BAdlns.

Click on "Create"

You can now see all available

Then you can click on the "View documentation"  to see how you can use it

I provided below the example of "Production Version Proposal"

I hope this info helps,

Marco

entry.title: Re: BPA Automation doesnt stop running,
entry.content: Hello Mateos, Thank you for reaching out to us. Could you please share a screenshot of your Agent Status? It would be helpful to cross-check the Agent Mode and test again. If the issue persists, please verify the Manage Attribute settings and ensure that your agent is correctly added in Agent Management for your environment. Let us know if you need further assistance.

entry.title: Re: SAC - Widget with separate filters
entry.content: Hi William, thanks for the reply. Yes I think this can works. Thanks!

entry.title: Re: SAC - Widget with separate filters
entry.content: Hi Denis, thanks for the exaustive reply. Yes I think It can works also this. Thanks!

entry.title: Re: Task 4 - Implement Criticality feature and create an Object page
Products in CPQ – BRIM S/4 Solution Quotation Integration
entry.content:
CPQ public cloud and S/4 Solution Quotation private cloud is very popular integration amongst SAP customers as it offers best of these both worlds enabling the customer’s sales team to create efficient quotes at a faster pace, negotiate the price and seal the deal.

The Master Data – Products and Business Partners in this integration plays a key role and it is imperative to understand the same for efficient process management. Let us look at the Products in this post.

 

  1. Leading system for Product creation in this integration is S/4 HANA, where integration is enabled with SAP Cloud Integration.
  2. Type of Products supported in this integration are:
    1. Sales
    2. Subscription
    3. Service Contract
  3. Product details that arrive to SAP CPQ from S/4:
    1. Name
    2. System ID
    3. Product Type
    4. Part Number
    5. Unit of Measure
    6. Category
    7. OrderItemType (property with value Sales or Subscription or Service Contract) which can’t be changed via the API or in the application.
  4. ImportMaterialsFromERP SOAP API is used to import the products in CPQ
  5. Set-Up Required in CPQ
    1. Product Types
    2. Product Categories
    3. Billing Cycle
    4. Service Profile
    5. Response Profile
    6. Billing Date
    7. Settlement Period
  6. Change Process scenarios are only supported for Subscription
  7. Products supported
    1. Simple Products             
    2. Configurable
    3. Multi-level/Parent-Child – Bundle, Non-Bundle, CPQ Bundle. BOM Explosion is required.

Products

General Item Category Group Code

Transactional Document Created on S/4 side

Children

Additional Info

Bundle Multi-level Product

Bundle (like a dummy product)

Bundle Parent will not have any follow-on document, as they are like dummy products. The children will have follow-on documents as per their type.

Sales(simple and configurable) Service Contract simple and configurable), Subscription( multi-level),

Mixed Product Type of parent child combination is allowed.e.g. Sales product can have sales, service contract and subscription product as child products

Non- Bundle Multi-level Product

Multi AVC

 

Sales, Subscription, Service Contract

Same type of products should be used as parent -child. e.g. Sales parent can have only sales as child products.

 

Transition Journey for Different Products

Type of Product

Additional Attributes Added during replication to CPQ

Transactional Document Created on S/4 side

Sales

None

Solution Quotation -> Sales Order

Subscription

·       Contract Duration

·       Billing Cycle

Contract Extension Period

Solution Quotation -> Subscription Contract

Service Contract

·       Service Profile

·       Response Profile

·       Billing date

·       Service Contract Duration

Settlement period

Solution Quotation -> Service Contracts


Value Mapping for SAP CPQ Integration with SAP Billing and Revenue Innovation Management

 

This key mapping for product is Bi-Directional(BD).

Agency

Identifier

Mapping

Agency

Identifier

CPQ

UnitofMeasure

BD

S/4

QuantityUnit

CPQ

OrderItemType

BD

S/4

QuotationItemOrderItemType

CPQ

ConditionCurrency

BD

S/4

ConditionCurrency

CPQ

BundleItemCategory

BD

S/4

Bundle

S/4

IndustrialSectorCode

BD

CPQ

PrimaryIndustry

S/4

ProductHierarchyInternalID

BD

CPQ

ProductCategoryUSEnglish

S/4

ProductTypeCode

BD

CPQ

OrderItemType

S/4

TimeZoneCode

BD

CPQ

TimeZone

S/4

CountryCode

BD

CPQ

Country

S/4

FormOfAddressCode

BD

CPQ

FormOfAddress

S/4

ProductTypeCode_ItemCategoryGroupCode

BD

CPQ

OrderItemType

S/4

RegionCode

BD

CPQ

State

 

Once Set-up is done in all systems – CPQ, CPI and  S/4 HANA, the master data creation can start and products can be replicated from S/4HANA to CPQ. Examples in SAP Help portal can be referred to for further reference on Master Data Creation.

entry.title: Re: Check Table for Custom field created using Custom Fie...
entry.content:
Hi Varun,

do you know how I can achieve the same behavior as a check table?

Example:
I enhance the material master data with a field which has key fields for plant or storage location and some further information to be enhanced.
So my expectation would be a check for e.g. plant or storage location (fields are already given in standard table which is to be enhanced) for filtering the check table entries/codelist.

PLANT (x)
CUSTOMER_SPECIFIC_FIELD

Codelist should be filtered by given plant of material master data like a check table.

I tried it with a CDS View which has a where condition with an importing parameter but this view is not selectable for codelist in Custom Fields app.

I did not found any proposed solution for this problem.

Kind Regards
Tim

entry.title: Re: Enabling your workforce for the future with the new integrated learning experience
entry.content: Hi @CMezger this is the intended behavior. The configurations used for the legacy search like sort do not apply to the enhanced search. It is not possible to change the sort order.

entry.title: Re: Extensibility Approaches in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
I have a question on Developer Extensibility  for Public Cloud. Its mentioned in the blog that Eclipse could be used for development  . However I also came across OSS  3016104 which says  for Custom CDS view creation only Fiori App " Custom CDS " can be used  and Eclipse is not supported.

Could you please clarify ? If Eclipse can be used on public cloud  then what type of development objects are supported to be developed with eclipse ?

entry.title: Re: Como Consultar Transação Por Role no Perfil de Um Usuário?
entry.content:
Olá Simone, tudo bem?

Então vamos lá:

1. Pergunta: Como ver as transações que o usuário possui?

Aqui poderá ter ver todas as transações que um determinado usuário possui.

2. Como descobrir quais as funções (roles) das transações?

Aqui você pode colocar até 5 transações por vez. E conseguir as funções destas transações.

Boa sorte

entry.title: How to migrate roles and auth from old ECC system to S/4 Hana green field implementation
entry.content:
Hello All,

 

We have master and derived roles concept in our old ecc system. We need to migrate the roles and auth to new S/4 HANA greenfiled implemnetation. There are lots of master and derived roles in the ECC systems which we require to migrate in new S/4 Hana system. How can we migrate roles and auth from old ECC system to S/4 Hana with greenfield approach

Regards,

Saurav

entry.title: Hide Ability to Create New Job Req From Specific Template But Not From Position Org Chart
entry.content: We would like to be able to remove the ability for a group to be able to create a specific kind of Job Req Template (Job Requisition - Pos Mgmt) from the Recruiting Module. We don't want to inactivate the Template entirely because we want them to be creating these kinds of Reqs from the Position Org Chart, but to only be creating them from the Position Org Chart. Is this possible?

entry.title: How to migrate data with CDS view behaviour LTMOM
entry.content:
Hello,

can someone please explain to me how I can migrate data with CDS view behaviours? I can't find anything online for this topic. I created an migrationobject over LTMOM and chose A_BANK_3 as CDS view behaviour. I've created a short sourcestructure with only the keyfields and mapped to the A_BANK_3 view for testing. I did download the template file and filled some testing values. But now i'm stuck. Whats the next step? How can I simulate data? Maybe somone could give me a step by step guide on how to use this method correctly. Thank you very much.

 

Greetings Alex

entry.title: Re: I have a business Requirement to extend FIORI app - P...
entry.content: Sounds like there is no option to support this requirement then as part of this BADI.  @Arushi the other option is look further upstream in the business process when the inbound delivery is created.

entry.title: B4HANA SQL Script Execution
entry.content:
Dear All,

We have the B4HANA system and given below are the detail, 

DW4CORE 200 0014 SAPK-20014INDW4CORE DATA Warehouse

Here i need to test some SQL Script and i am able to do it from DB02, but would like to know if there is any other way other than DB02 as this t-code or the "dbcockpit" tcode is not allowed in PRD B4HANA system. In such case we need the "SQL Editor" in PRD to test few scipts.

entry.title: Re: how can i pass a dyanamic data to content of cms rotating banner image component
entry.content: Please don't post to Questions about SAP Websites (issue with community Website, etc.) if it's a question about SAP software. Instead, ask in Technology Q&A: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/qa-p/technology-questions. Hopefully someone will fix it for you.

entry.title: Re: Issue with displaying Personalized Banner with SAP Composable Storefront
entry.content: need a solution for the same please facing same issue

entry.title: Re: Non PO Invoice Item Not Picked S/4HANA from SAP Business Network
entry.content: Hello did you find out anything on line items which are not visible in S4? we are also implementing the same and faced same issue if you found solution then please share.

entry.title: Re: How to create OData Services with Mobile Application Integration Framework (MAIF)
entry.content: Thanks Mauricio the blog is very interesting and useful. Really a great job.

entry.title: Re: Question on Just Ask
entry.content:
Hi Vish,
Thanks for sharing !
Looking at your examples, and assuming the underlying model contrains APAC as a dimension value and product as dimension. Just ask shoud answer these correctly. 

You can check the type of questions supported by just ask (as of august 2024). I've posted in a comment the this blog post.
https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/initial-release-of-sap-analytics-cloud-just-ask/bc-p/13697890#M172377
Also if you haven't yet, try selected the model before asking the question. And finally  I see supernumerary 'for'  in the question:  "for for 2023" and "for by product", have you tried without these ?

entry.title: Re: Padding is invalid and cannot be removed
entry.content:
Need more details about when you are getting this error, it's not a CR error so look to be something you are doing in your code or configuration settings.

A quick Google search found this:

https://stackoverflow.com/questions/8583112/padding-is-invalid-and-cannot-be-removed

entry.title: Re: Control who appears in org chart
entry.content:
Hi - thanks for your response. My question was geared more towards org chart bout getting them in SF:

Will they show up in org chart or can we hide them? We have managers who have over 20 non- payroll temps so we would not want to clutter org chat.

and f they will show up in org chart, can we customize to differentiate them maybe with color tile or a filter on the org chart page to filter on employee type?

entry.title: Viewing customer failed in Support Launchpad
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

for a customer of my organization, we are unable to view it in the list of customers in order to open an incident or request a license.

Viewing customer failed in Support Launchpad, but in the list of On-Premise Active Sales Contracts result active

All our users are enabled and have permissions to access for these features.

Has anyone ever had this kind of issue?

thanks to anyone who can help me.

entry.title: How to release a retention payment during Payment Run
entry.content: We are trying to set up Retention Payments in SAP. We have gone all the way through the MIRO and everything looks correct. Let's say the PO IR amount is 100 and 10 of that is held for retention. When we invoice for the 100, 10 gets held as expected. Payment run executes and invoices 90. Question is how do we trigger the invoicing/payment run to pick up the remaining 10?
